languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

languages.text: "Успокойтесь, сенешаль. Я полагаю, что это лишь одна из крайне качественных иллюзий, коих здесь в избытке".
"Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

languages.text: 「落ち着いてください、執事。ここは高度な錯覚が溢れる場所ですから、これはほんの一例に過ぎません」
languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

traits.locale_text: 「落ち着いてください、執事。ここは高度な錯覚が溢れる場所ですから、これはほんの一例に過ぎません。」

languages.text: « Ne cédez pas à la panique, sénéchal. Je pense que ce n'est qu'une autre de ces illusions remarquablement élaborées qui abondent ici. »
languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

traits.locale_text: « Ne cédez pas à la panique, sénéchal. Je pense que ce n'est qu'une autre de ces illusions remarquablement élaborées qui abondent ici. »

languages.text: "Beruhigt Euch, Truchsess. "Ich glaube, das ist nur eine dieser ausgesprochen komplexen Illusionen, die es hier im Überfluss gibt."
languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

traits.locale_text: "Beruhigt Euch, Truchsess. "Ich glaube, das ist nur eine dieser ausgesprochen komplexen Illusionen, die es hier im Überfluss gibt."

languages.text: "Sakinleş Seneşal. Bunun burada bolca bulunan son derece sofistike illüzyonlardan sadece biri olduğuna inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

traits.locale_text: "Sakinleş Seneşal. Bunun burada bolca bulunan son derece sofistike illüzyonlardan sadece biri olduğuna inanıyorum."

languages.text: «Cálmese, senescal. Creo que es una más de las sofisticadas ilusiones que abundan en este lugar».
languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

traits.locale_text: «Cálmese, senescal. Creo que es una más de las sofisticadas ilusiones que abundan en este lugar».

languages.text: “冷静些，总领。我相信这不过是此地遍布的精妙幻象之一而已。”
languages.original_text: "Settle yourself, Seneschal. I believe this is but one of the highly sophisticated illusions that abound here."

traits.locale_text: “冷静些，总领。我相信这不过是此地遍布的精妙幻象之一而已。”
